visual_description: A wide shot captures a tense scene in a dimly lit, modern conference room. A group of men are gathered around a long, dark table. On one side, several men in dark clothing are seated, their backs mostly to the camera. On the other side, an older man with gray hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket, is seated and eating from a small plate. Standing behind him are several other men in light blue, button-down shirts and ties, observing the scene. In the background, more men are visible, some standing and some walking through a glass partition that separates the main room from another area. A large, dark, abstract map or image is mounted on the wall to the left. In the top left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters are visible. The camera remains stationary, providing a comprehensive view of the entire group and the room's layout. A man speaks in a calm, conversational, and slightly teasing tone, as if making a casual observation. He says, "哎，陈哥，胃口很好啊，不错嘛。" (Hey, Brother Chen, you have a good appetite, not bad.) Another man replies with a short, slightly gruff, and affirmative, "不错啊。" (Not bad.) The background
